The Shift (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $12,118,219Details
International Box Office $109,542
Worldwide Box Office $12,227,761
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Kevin Garner meets a nefarious adversary known as The Benefactor. When Kevin refuses The Benefactor’s offer of wealth and power, he is shifted into an alternate totalitarian reality. Kevin’s main goal is to make it back to the world he knows and the woman he loves.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,300,165 (35.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.82 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,450 opening theaters/2,450 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $13,241,167

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 1st, 2023 (Wide) by Angel Studios
International Releases: December 15th, 2023 (Limited) (United Kingdom)
March 7th, 2024 (Limited) (Mexico)
April 12th, 2024 (Wide) (Ecuador)
April 12th, 2024 (Wide) (Peru)
April 12th, 2024 (Wide) (Guatemala)
Video Release: February 27th, 2024 by Angel Studios
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence and thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2809 (cert #54736), 11/15/2023)
Running Time: 115 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Unnamed Character
Plot point: Alternative Dimensions / Parallel universe, Car Accident
Social setting: Dystopia
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Angel Studios, Pure Flix, Nook Lane Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Kevin Garner meets a nefarious adversary known as The Benefactor. When Kevin refuses The Benefactor’s offer of wealth and power, he is shifted into an alternate totalitarian reality. Kevin’s main goal is to make it back to the world he knows and the woman he loves.
